allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Attributes | Sort-Object Name | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "claude|agent" })
PowerShell($p = "$env:USERPROFILE"; Write-Host "Profile: $p"; Get-ChildItem -Path $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 30 | Format-Table Name, Attributes -AutoSize)
